message:
refactor(ui): simplify theme provider and improve component consistency

theme-provider.tsx:
- Simplify implementation by removing redundant state
- Leverage next-themes more directly
- Reduce bundle size with less custom logic

Toast Components:
- Improve animation consistency
- Better accessibility with ARIA attributes
- Cleaner dismiss handling

offline-banner.tsx:
- Simplify styling and layout
- Better animation for show/hide

BasketSidebar.tsx:
- Minor cleanup and consistency

CharacterReveal.tsx:
- Animation timing refinements

PromptDetailModal.tsx:
- Improved layout and responsiveness
- Better keyboard navigation

SwipeablePromptCard.tsx:
- Enhanced touch gesture handling
- Better haptic feedback integration

PromptCard.test.tsx:
- Test maintenance updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
